title: Snowballs Plus: Resource pack
description:
Resource Pack for "Snowballs Plus".

Detail:
-Allows for different snow ball textures.
body:
### Pack Goal
This Resource Pack is meant to be used with "Snowballs Plus" to change the look of certain
snowballs

### Additions:
-New Snowball Texture for a "Hard Snowball" -> CustomModel:226590

### Usage
-Place the resource pack in your "resource packs" folder to use it.
